visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing an off-shoulder brown top and black skirt, stands centered in a brightly lit Costco warehouse aisle. She holds a large 15-pack of yellow canned corn soup in a cardboard tray. The background features tall blue industrial shelving units packed with snack boxes and canned goods under flat, bright overhead lighting. A large red and blue logo is superimposed at the top. (2) The woman addresses the camera with an animated facial expression and smiles while gesturing toward the soup cans. Her hands firmly grip the product tray as she explains its features. Bold red and yellow variety text graphics pop onto the screen over the product. The environment remains a busy retail setting with deep shelves containing bulk food items stretching into the distance. (3) The camera pans slightly as the woman rotates the soup pack to show the side labeling. She continues speaking with a friendly, engaging manner, pointing at the cans. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame tracking her dialogue. The setting is consistent, showing a high-volume warehouse store with stacked pallets of product and visible price tags on the shelves behind her.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 不用去日本扛貨回來了. (2) [Subtitle]: 天啊 日本罐裝濃湯 1罐26.6元. (3) [Variety]: 極品脆粒玉米濃湯. (4) [Subtitle]: 這個啊 好像直接加熱就會很好吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後日本人都直接冷冷的吃. [Variety]: 冷冷的吃. (6) [Subtitle]: 沒有 他們也有那種販賣機是賣熱的. (7) [Subtitle]: 恩 然後399元 他有幾個. (8) [Subtitle]: 他有15罐 190公克. (9) [Subtitle]: 15罐 所以每一罐. (10) [Subtitle]: 26.6元 我說過了. (11) [Subtitle]: 喔你說過了 然後他還挺多的. (12) [Subtitle]: 在這邊終於有上架了 看到可以考慮看看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator holding the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long straight black hair, wearing a brown off-shoulder blouse and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse interior with tall blue metal racking, stacked boxes of food items, and visible pricing signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear female voice begins with a bright, energetic tone, welcoming viewers. The background features a steady, upbeat acoustic BGM with a guitar-driven melody at 115 BPM. A synthesized 'pop' sound effect triggers as the first text bubble appears visually. The ambient room tone is minimal and clean. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect marks the appearance of price information. An off-camera male voice interjects with a question about the quantity, exhibiting a lower-pitched, conversational timbre. The primary female vocal maintains a high speech rate while articulating the unit price and package details clearly. (3) A soft 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates an emotional variety text graphic. The BGM continues with light percussion, maintaining a consistent rhythm. The speakers exchange quick dialogue phrases without any pauses, showing high vocal density. The signal clarity is professional with no audible distortion or masking from background noise.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence -> Quantitative Detail -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation for a specific bulk-buy canned corn soup at Costco. The creator uses the 'no need to go to Japan' hook to emphasize convenience and competitive pricing, providing a direct product value assessment for her audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product showcasing, pricing callouts, and brand-name mention of the retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density text overlays and cheerful audio design target social media consumers interested in bulk shopping and imported Japanese food products.
